title: The Unopened Envelope
narration:
I hated my father for twenty years for his silence, until I opened his closet.

He never replied to my childhood letters. I assumed he chose a life without me.

I found a dusty shoebox tucked behind his winter coats. Inside were my letters, all opened, and his unmailed replies.

His letters revealed my mother’s criminal past, and his terrifying need to keep me hidden from her reach.

He didn't abandon me; he sacrificed our relationship to keep me alive.
